seoTitle: CR Micro News | Product Releases, Company Updates | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from CR Microelectronics including new product releases, technology announcements, and company developments.

news.title: CR Micro Expands Power MOSFET Portfolio with New High-Voltage Series
news.summary: CR Micro announces the expansion of its power MOSFET portfolio with new high-voltage super-junction devices targeting industrial and automotive applications.
news.content:
CR Microelectronics has announced the expansion of its power MOSFET portfolio with the introduction of a new series of high-voltage super-junction devices. These new MOSFETs feature improved efficiency and reduced switching losses, making them ideal for industrial power supplies, solar inverters, and automotive applications.

The new series includes devices rated from 600V to 900V with RDS(on) as low as 0.1Ω. These devices are manufactured using CR Micro's advanced super-junction technology, which provides superior performance compared to conventional planar MOSFETs.

Key features of the new series include:
- Ultra-low RDS(on) for reduced conduction losses
- Fast switching characteristics for high-frequency operation
- Excellent avalanche ruggedness for reliable operation
- AEC-Q101 qualification for automotive applications

The new devices are available in a variety of packages including TO-220, TO-247, and surface-mount options to meet different application requirements.
news.author: CR Microelectronics

news.title: CR Micro IGBTs Gain Traction in Industrial Motor Drive Applications
news.summary: CR Micro's IGBT products are increasingly being adopted in industrial motor drive applications, offering cost-effective alternatives to international brands.
news.content:
CR Microelectronics reports growing adoption of its IGBT products in industrial motor drive applications. The company's trench field-stop IGBTs are being used in variable frequency drives, servo systems, and industrial automation equipment.

The CR Micro IGBT portfolio includes devices rated at 600V, 650V, and 1200V with current ratings from 10A to 200A. These devices feature low VCE(sat) and optimized switching characteristics for high-efficiency operation.

Key benefits for industrial applications:
- Cost-effective alternative to international brands
- Shorter lead times and reliable supply
- Local technical support in Chinese
- Comprehensive application support

CR Micro continues to expand its IGBT portfolio with new devices targeting emerging applications such as renewable energy and electric vehicle charging.
news.author: BeiLuo Electronics

news.title: CR Micro Introduces New LED Driver Solutions for Smart Lighting
news.summary: New LED driver ICs from CR Micro support smart lighting applications with high efficiency and advanced dimming capabilities.
news.content:
CR Microelectronics has introduced a new family of LED driver ICs designed for smart lighting applications. These new devices offer high efficiency, advanced dimming capabilities, and comprehensive protection features.

The new LED driver portfolio includes:
- AC-DC isolated flyback drivers (5W-100W)
- Non-isolated buck drivers (3W-50W)
- High-power factor solutions for commercial lighting
- TRIAC dimmable drivers for retrofit applications

Key features include:
- High efficiency up to 93%
- Power factor correction (PFC) for compliance with regulations
- Analog and PWM dimming support
- Comprehensive protection (OVP, OCP, OTP)
- Low standby power consumption

These new LED driver solutions enable lighting manufacturers to develop energy-efficient, reliable products for residential, commercial, and industrial applications.
news.author: CR Microelectronics

news.title: CR Micro Achieves IATF 16949 Certification for Automotive Quality
news.summary: CR Microelectronics has achieved IATF 16949 certification, demonstrating its commitment to quality in automotive semiconductor manufacturing.
news.content:
CR Microelectronics is pleased to announce that it has achieved IATF 16949 certification for its automotive semiconductor manufacturing operations. This certification recognizes CR Micro's commitment to quality management in the automotive industry.

The IATF 16949 certification is the international standard for quality management systems in the automotive industry. It is based on ISO 9001 with additional requirements specific to automotive applications.

This certification covers:
- Design and development of automotive semiconductors
- Manufacturing processes and quality control
- Supply chain management
- Continuous improvement programs

CR Micro's automotive product portfolio includes AEC-Q101 qualified MOSFETs, IGBTs, and protection devices suitable for various automotive applications including powertrain, body electronics, and safety systems.

The IATF 16949 certification, combined with existing AEC-Q101 qualifications, positions CR Micro as a reliable supplier for automotive electronics manufacturers worldwide.
news.author: CR Microelectronics

news.title: CR Micro Expands Protection Device Portfolio with New TVS and ESD Products
news.summary: CR Micro introduces new TVS diodes and ESD protection devices for consumer, industrial, and automotive applications.
news.content:
CR Microelectronics has expanded its protection device portfolio with the introduction of new TVS diodes and ESD protection devices. These new products provide robust circuit protection for a wide range of applications.

New TVS diode series:
- High-power TVS (3000W-6600W) for industrial applications
- Automotive-grade TVS with AEC-Q101 qualification
- Low-capacitance TVS for high-speed data lines
- Array devices for multi-line protection

New ESD protection devices:
- Ultra-low capacitance (<0.5pF) for USB 3.0 and HDMI
- High-speed interface protection arrays
- Automotive ESD protection with high reliability

All new protection devices meet or exceed industry standards including:
- IEC 61000-4-2 (ESD immunity)
- IEC 61000-4-5 (surge immunity)
- AEC-Q101 for automotive applications

These new products expand CR Micro's ability to provide comprehensive circuit protection solutions for consumer electronics, industrial equipment, and automotive systems.
news.author: CR Microelectronics
